text:
The search results do not return a paper with the exact title "Prophet inequalities with unknown distributions" as a primary paper. Instead, they reference a real STOC 2017 paper by Abolhassani, Ehsani, Esfandiari, Hajiaghayi, Kleinberg, and Lucier titled "Beating 1-1/e for ordered prophets." The cited authors (Esfandiari, Hajiaghayi, Lucier, Zadimoghaddam) and title do not match any verified paper in the academic databases or web search results.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper with the exact title "Prophet inequalities with unknown distributions" exists in any academic database or was found on the web. The real STOC 2017 paper by the overlapping authors (Esfandiari, Hajiaghayi, Lucier) is "Beating 1-1/e for ordered prophets," suggesting this reference conflates a real paper with a fabricated title and partially matching authors.
LINK: NONE
